Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EmailAdministrationSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EmailAdministrationSettings
public class EmailAdministrationSettings extends Metadata

Java class for EmailAdministrationSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmailAdministrationSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableComplianceBcc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailConsentManagement" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailSenderIdCompliance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailSpfCompliance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailToSalesforce" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailTrackingIPBlocklist" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailWorkflowApproval" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEnhancedEmailEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHandleBouncedEmails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHtmlEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInternationalEmailAddresses" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableListEmailLogActivities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableResendBouncedEmails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRestrictTlsToDomains" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSendThroughGmailPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSendViaExchangePref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSendViaGmailPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUseOrgFootersForExtTrans" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableVerifyEmailDomainByDkim" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sendEmailsEvenWhenAutomationUpdatesSameRecord" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sendMassEmailNotification" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sendTextOnlySystemEmails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
